faq-subtext.content: Everything you need to know about our platform. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.

items.title: What is included in the free plan?
items.content: The free plan includes up to 3 projects, 1 GB of storage, community support, and access to all core features. No credit card required to get started.

items.title: How do I upgrade my subscription?
items.content: Navigate to Settings > Billing in your dashboard. Select your desired plan and enter payment details. Your new features activate immediately, and we prorate the cost.

items.title: Can I cancel my subscription at any time?
items.content: Yes. You can cancel from your billing settings at any time. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period. We don't charge cancellation fees.

items.title: Do you offer team or enterprise pricing?
items.content: Absolutely. Teams of 5+ get 20% off per seat. Enterprise plans include SSO, dedicated support, custom SLAs, and volume discounts. Contact sales@example.com for a quote.

items.title: Is my data secure?
items.content: We use AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. Our infrastructure is SOC 2 Type II certified, and we conduct annual third-party penetration tests.

items.title: What integrations do you support?
items.content: We integrate with Slack, GitHub, Jira, Figma, Linear, Notion, and 40+ other tools via our REST API and native connectors. Custom webhooks are available on Pro plans.

items.title: How does the 14-day trial work?
items.content: Start your trial with full access to Pro features. No credit card needed. At the end of 14 days, choose a paid plan or continue on the free tier with no data loss.

items.title: What happens to my data if I downgrade?
items.content: Your data is preserved for 90 days after downgrade. Projects exceeding free-tier limits become read-only. You can export everything at any time from Settings > Data Export.
